headline: Madison Air Up 16% After Biggest US Industrial IPO Since ‘99
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Madison Air Solutions Corp. shares rose 16% after the company raised $2.23 billion in the biggest US listing of an industrial firm in close to three decades.Shares of the provider of ventilation and filtration systems traded at $31.26 as of 1:07 p.m. Thursday afternoon in New York, compared to the initial public offering price of $27 each. headline: CoreWeave Taps US Junk-Debt Market Again With AI Bond Reopening
summary: (Bloomberg) -- CoreWeave Inc. is tapping the US junk-bond market for a second time in a week as the cloud infrastructure firm seizes on strong investor demand.The Livingston, New Jersey-based company is selling $1 billion of additional 9.75% senior notes due 2031, it said in a statement. Proceeds will repay outstanding debt among other corporate uses, it added.
